items.caption: Two hands clasped in a handshake, with the text "values" at the top. the text below the handshake reads, "italians value many things. they value the handshake, and they value cleanliness." the background is blurred, but it appears to be a formal setting, possibly an office or a corporate event. the focus is on the handshake, which is a symbol of agreement or partnership. the text suggests that the handshake is considered an important value in italian culture, along with cleanliness.
